prompt: A surreal, photorealistic landscape. Many small distinct river streams on the ground all curve sharply to the left. However, the collective arrangement of these small left-curving streams forms a massive canyon structure that unmistakably points to the right. No arrows, no text, no numbers. Cinematic lighting.
visual_logic: Local elements (streams) universally trend in one direction (left), but their aggregate form (the canyon) trends in the opposite direction (right), visually embodying how subgroups can reverse a trend when combined.
